description: Betrothal record from 1093 in which the obligatory betrothal gift is 4 and one/sixth dinars. The document also stipulates the daughter receives the uppermost floor of a house; if she preferred to live elsewhere, she would receive rent, but her father and his heirs were responsible for the payment of the ground rent and watchman. Signed by Eli ha-Kohen b. Yahya, Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq (the Scholar), and Ezekiel II ha-Kohen he-Ḥaver b. Eli he-Ḥaver I. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:522, 3:445, 4:96, 374) EMS
description_he: רשומת אירוסין 1093. מתנת האירוסין 4⅙ דינרים. הבת מקבלת קומה עליונה בבית.
